first_dialog: Alright, I got your Swapdeck fixed! It's available for purchase at the checkout counter for $400. You're really lucky, these things are sold out throughout the world.

Anyway, I've got to finish my shift now, I've got to update the antivirus software on the store computers. Maybe when I get off you can let me test out that Swapdeck as well - I really do want to see if it lives to the hype.
possible_dialog: I'm busy coming up with excuses not to do work right now, talk to me later.
